ItacPersonItem.Notes: Acerbo studied as a novice in the Nunziatella in Naples. He was a Jesuit, and taught philosophy and theology at L`Aquila and Naples. a respected neo Latin poet. On this author, see Enza Graziano, De natali auctoris Calabriae solo : la terra di Calabria patria dell`autore : Francesco Acerbo tra storia e poesia (Lamezia Terme: Liceo Classico "F. Fiorentino", 1997), and the review in La Civilta` cattolica (1998).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
